testCases.title: Create a new account and verify login
testCases.description: End-to-end flow: register a new customer, log out, log in with the same credentials, and confirm the account balance is visible on the dashboard.
testCases.preconditions: Parabank application is reachable; Chromium browser is installed; automation framework dependencies are installed.
testCases.testData: First name: John; Last name: Doe; Address: 221B Baker Street; City: Springfield; State: California; ZIP: 90210; Phone: 5551234567; SSN: 123-45-6789; Username and password are generated randomly per run.
testCases.expectedResult: User is registered successfully, can log in after logout, and account balance is displayed (currency format, e.g. $515.50). Screenshot saved to proofs/balance.png.
testCases.bddScenario: Create a new account and verify login
testCases.evidence: Screenshot: proofs/balance.png; Video: videos/; Report: cucumber-report.html

testSteps.action: Navigate to the Parabank registration page
testSteps.bddStep: the user is on the signup page

testSteps.action: Fill registration form with valid customer details and submit
testSteps.testData: Random username/password; fixed address and personal fields per SignupPage.register()
testSteps.expectedResult: Account is created; user is logged in; Log Out link is visible
testSteps.bddStep: the user registers with valid details

testSteps.action: Navigate to login page and sign in with credentials created during registration
testSteps.testData: Same username and password from step 2
testSteps.expectedResult: User is authenticated and redirected to the accounts overview
testSteps.bddStep: logs in with the same credentials

testSteps.action: Verify account balance is displayed and capture proof screenshot
testSteps.expectedResult: Balance value is shown in account table; screenshot saved as proofs/balance.png
testSteps.bddStep: the user should see the account balance displayed
